items.title: NFLPA "strongly opposes" proposed changes to California workers' compensation laws
items.body_text: Although most of an NFL player's rights and responsibilities are governed by the Collective Bargaining Agreement between the NFL Players Association and the NFL, the geographic location of a player's employment has a potentially significant impact on their overall work experience.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Jeff Hafley: The tush push is hard to stop, and Dolphins can get good at it
items.body_text: New Dolphins head coach Jeff Hafley wants his team to be good at the tush push, on both sides of the ball.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: NFL Network remains off Comcast Xfinity cable
items.body_text: If the dispute extends into the regular season, it would also mean Xfinity subscribers would not have NFL RedZone Channel.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: NCAA finds that four Alabama State basketball players threw a game for $2,000
items.body_text: The biggest risk when it comes to the proliferation of legal sports betting comes from the possibility of players deliberately losing games.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: NCAA denies Texas Tech's appeal regarding Brendan Sorsby's eligibility
items.body_text: As a judge weighs whether to reinstate the eligibility of Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby, the NCAA has reiterated its decision that Sorsby's gambling habits prevent him from playing again.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Caleb Williams pays homage to Michael Jordan on Madden 27 cover
items.body_text: Caleb Williams wants to trademark the nickname of one Basketball Hall of Famer, but he wants to be like another.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Wan'Dale Robinson chose No. 4 to honor Rondale Moore
items.body_text: Titans wide receiver Wan'Dale Robinson wore No. 17 in his four seasons with the Giants.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Eagles sign rookie DT Zion Wilson
items.body_text: The Eagles signed free agent defensive tackle Zion Wilson, the team announced.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker: Bears' shifting positions have hindered their progress
items.body_text: With the Bears announcing a plan to proceed with plans to build a new stadium (but with nothing official at this point), Illinois still has a chance to turn things around.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Myles Garrett: I don't know Aaron Donald's plans, but I want to talk to him
items.body_text: The Rams' defensive line has already added a two-time NFL Defensive Player of the Year this week in Myles Garrett.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: More details emerge in Jonathon Cooper's arrest
items.body_text: More details have emerged in the arrest of Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: DaRon Bland, Donovan Ezeiruaku are expected to be ready for training camp
items.body_text: Cowboys cornerback DaRon Bland and edge rusher Donovan Ezeiruaku aren't practicing with their teammates yet as they continue rehabbing.
items.author: Charean Williams

items.title: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson: Hammond move is not a "done deal"
items.body_text: Friday's announcement from the Bears regarding the intention to move forward with a new stadium in Hammond, Indiana doesn't mean much, because it's not binding on the Bears.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Jared Verse to wear No. 8 with Browns, Dillon Gabriel will change his number
items.body_text: Jared Verse and Dillon Gabriel were both wearing No. 8 at Browns practice this week, but that won't be the case for long.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Baker Mayfield: Disappointing to lose Mike Evans, but we have a lot of weapons
items.body_text: Baker Mayfield's take on his contract situation was the juiciest bit of information to come out of his first media session of the offseason, but he also had a chance to weigh in on a significant change to the team's receiving corps.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: NFL defends streaming strategy in letter to Congress
items.body_text: The House Judiciary Committee will conduct a hearing next week on the Sports Broadcasting Act.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Broncos LB Jonathon Cooper arrested for domestic violence
items.body_text: Broncos linebacker Jonathon Cooper was arrested in Colorado on Thursday night.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Bears board of directors votes to advance stadium in Hammond, Indiana
items.body_text: The Bears are a step closer to playing their home games across the border.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Cowboys agree to terms with first-rounder Malachi Lawrence
items.body_text: The Cowboys have all of their draft picks under contract.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Sean Payton pleased with how fast Jaylen Waddle is picking up the Broncos' offense
items.body_text: The Broncos have just started their Organized Team Activities, and newly acquired wide receiver Jaylen Waddle is already impressing head coach Sean Payton.
items.author: Michael David Smith

items.title: Mac Jones: No regrets about signing a two-year deal with 49ers
items.body_text: Mac Jones had a strong run as the starting quarterback for the 49ers while Brock Purdy was injured last season, but there was no chance to cash in on that as a free agent this offseason.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Baker Mayfield, Buccaneers are "not anywhere close" in talks on new contract
items.body_text: Mayfield is entering the final season of the three-year deal he signed with Tampa Bay in 2024.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Bears agree to terms with top 2026 draft picks, Dillon Thieneman, Logan Jones
items.body_text: The Bears are getting their top two draft picks under contract.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Dan Campbell: Jahmyr Gibbs is going to be our bell cow now
items.body_text: After two years as a major contributor, Lions running back Jahmyr Gibbs was promoted to starter in 2025.
items.author: Myles Simmons

items.title: Mike Evans thought he'd easily break the record for consecutive 1,000-yard seasons in 2025
items.body_text: In 2024, 49ers receiver Mike Evans set a record in Tampa by becoming the first player with 11 straight 1,000-yard receiving seasons to start a career.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Courtland Sutton unconcerned with who is Broncos No. 1 receiver after Jaylen Waddle's arrival
items.body_text: There was no doubt about Courtland Sutton's placement in the pecking order of Broncos receivers in 2025, but the team's biggest offseason move shook up that depth chart.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Report: Bears spoke to Chicago throughout April about possible stadium deal
items.body_text: In late March, the Bears made their position clear regarding a new stadium — Arlington Heights or Hammond, Indiana.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Report: NFL Network acquisition will spark more ESPN layoffs
items.body_text: The more a company grows, the more it looks for ways to shrink the workforce.
items.author: Mike Florio

items.title: Vikings LT Christian Darrisaw says knee feels best it has since 2024 injury
items.body_text: The Vikings have played 34 regular season games over the last two seasons, but they've only had left tackle Christian Darrisaw for half of them.
items.author: Josh Alper

items.title: Jahmyr Gibbs: My agent can handle my contract, I'm just thinking about the team and ball
items.body_text: Lions running back Jahmyr Gibbs is heading into the fourth season of his rookie contract, which means he's eligible to get a new deal, and surely wants to become one of the highest-paid running backs in football.
items.author: Michael David Smith
